title: Oh Baby Girl Lyrics Maalai Pozhuthin Mayakathile Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Achu, Narayana Nagendra Rao
Song: Oh Baby Girl
Movie : Maalai Pozhuthin Mayakathile
Music : Achu
Lyrics : Rohini

Hey penne, en penne
un paarvaiyil naan mayangi vitten
Kanne en kanne
un pechilae naan ennai maranthaen
oh baby girl.. oh oh baby girl.. (2)

En kaadhal solla vanden
moondru vaarthai solla nindren
nee ennai vittu ponaai
thooramaaga sendraai
Sollaamal ponaai kanne
nee enthan vaazhkai thaane
nee illai endral indru naanum illaye ..

Ada thirumbiyum vanthaai
adi yen neeyae vanthaai
oru nodiyil ennai kondraai
en kangalai nee vendraai..vendraai
ithu kaadhal thaane..

En uyire..en uyire,
en kanave en anbe..
En kaathal neethaanae
enthan tharisanam neethaanae.. (2)

Everbody is looking at us
I feel good coz, you are my girl
and I know it baby
and now lets get down down to business
coz i wanna make you my misses
forever and ever..oh baby girl oh..
I need you now that I left you
i feel like jumping..

Hey coffee mugilae kaathal vanthathenna
unnai paarthathum nenjukul pookal enna

Netru nadandhadhum naalai marappadhenna
vaanam pachchai nirathil sirippadhenna

Enathu kanavil kangal ketpadhenna
panikku kulirvathenna.... ohhh..

en uyire.. en uyire..
oh oh oh oh..oh oh oh oh..
oh oh oh oh.. oh oh oh oh..
en uyire.. oh oh oh oh.. en uyire..

Ithu kaadhal thaana ..
En uyire..en uyire,
en kanave en anbe..
En kaathal neethaanae
enthan tharisanam neethaanae.. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Baby Girl'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between the lovers.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey'?

The movie revolves around themes of romance and the complexities of relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Achu and Narayana Nagendra Rao, with music composed by Achu.

When was 'Oh Baby Girl' released?

The song was released on February 15, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Oh Baby Girl', the protagonists express their feelings of love and yearning, encapsulating the bittersweet nature of romance. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of nostalgia, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love's highs and lows. Set against the backdrop of the movie Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey, it serves as a poignant reminder of the emotional connections that define our relationships. This duet beautifully conveys the essence of longing and affection, leaving listeners with a sense of warmth and reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Baby Girl from the movie Maalai Pozhudhin Mayakathilaey is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Achu's soulful composition and the harmonious vocals of Achu and Narayana Nagendra Rao, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. Dive into the enchanting world of this melody that perfectly blends nostalgia with heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Hey girl, I got lost in your eyes. With your words, I forgot myself, oh baby girl.. oh oh baby girl.
I came to express my love, but you left me without saying anything. If you are not in my life, then I too am not here today.
You came back, and you are the one who took me away in a moment. You are the one I wanted.. this is love.
My life.. my life, my dream, my love.. My love is you, my vision is you.

Everybody is looking at us. I feel good because you are my girl, and I know it, baby. Now let's get down to business because I want to make you my misses forever and ever.. oh baby girl oh.. I need you now that I left you, I feel like jumping.
Hey coffee-colored cloud, what does love mean? Just seeing you fills my heart.
What does the intoxication of the evening mean? What does the rain remind us of?
What happened yesterday, I forget tomorrow. Why does the sky smile in green?
What does it mean when I hear dreams in my sleep? What does it mean when I feel cold?
My life.. my life.. oh oh oh oh.. oh oh oh oh.. oh oh oh oh.. oh oh oh oh.. my life.. oh oh oh oh.. my life..
Is this love? My life.. my life, my dream, my love.. My love is you, my vision is you.
